description: Goal: prove recursion and edits are facts, not phases. Change: finite activation keys, widening/join policy for recursive SCCs, owned-output retraction across root epochs. Check: qsort/partition converges; redefining main to call foo instead of qsort retracts qsort/partition/append from SemanticClosed.
title: Compiler2 semantic: support recursive convergence and root retractions
